script: RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv); TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' -d "refresh_token=$RT" -d 'scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.All offline_access' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin)["access_token"])'); echo '=== Jose installed Claude apps ==='; curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/f1cff123-735c-43a8-9e78-b26d4735ffb7/teamwork/installedApps?\$expand=teamsApp" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" > /tmp/j.json; python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/j.json')); [print('  '+a.get('teamsApp',{}).get('displayName','?'),'/',a['id']) for a in d.get('value',[]) if 'Claude' in a.get('teamsApp',{}).get('displayName','') or 'Codex' in a.get('teamsApp',{}).get('displayName','')]"; echo; echo '=== Axel installed Claude apps (with install-id for Aixa) ==='; curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/f19c9082-be60-4704-91ed-9154a4e0bd17/teamwork/installedApps?\$expand=teamsApp" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" > /tmp/a.json; AIXA_INST=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/a.json'));[print(a['id']) for a in d.get('value',[]) if a.get('teamsApp',{}).get('id')=='838b509f-cb65-4d65-85ef-d1d4db247368']"); python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/a.json')); [print('  '+a.get('teamsApp',{}).get('displayName','?'),'/',a['id']) for a in d.get('value',[]) if 'Claude' in a.get('teamsApp',{}).get('displayName','') or 'Codex' in a.get('teamsApp',{}).get('displayName','')]"; echo "  aixa_install_id=$AIXA_INST"; if [ -n "$AIXA_INST" ]; then C=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X DELETE "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/f19c9082-be60-4704-91ed-9154a4e0bd17/teamwork/installedApps/$AIXA_INST" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"); echo "  uninstall aixa from axel: $C"; fi; echo; echo '=== Services ==='; systemctl is-active jose-bot jose-responder axel-bot axel-responder | paste -sd' '; echo; echo '=== Service uptime ==='; for s in jose-bot jose-responder axel-bot axel-responder; do echo "  $s: $(systemctl show $s -p ActiveEnterTimestamp --value)"; done
